name: Mexico City

palette.name: Terracotta Sun
palette.rationale: Warm mineral tones reflect plaster, stone, and sunlit facades.

palette.name: Canal Jade
palette.rationale: Murals, crafts, and neighborhood markets often include vivid blue-green accents.

palette.name: Jacaranda Violet
palette.rationale: Seasonal jacaranda blooms create a memorable citywide violet layer.

sources.title: Gobierno de la Ciudad de México
sources.publisher: Gobierno de la Ciudad de México

editorialSummary: Mexico City's palette fuses warm masonry, saturated cultural cyan-greens, and seasonal purple flora.
